description: Determines caller type or segment type for the Moonlight Radio scenario. Roll d100 + Revelation Score.

descriptionTranslations.en: Determines caller type or segment type for the Moonlight Radio scenario. Roll d100 + Revelation Score.

entries.result: Question: They have a question for you

resultTranslations.en: Question: They have a question for you

entries.result: I Have To Tell You This Thing: They want to talk about something strange that happened to them or that they witnessed

resultTranslations.en: I Have To Tell You This Thing: They want to talk about something strange that happened to them or that they witnessed

entries.result: Crank: The caller is a crank caller who will likely say something snarky then hang up

resultTranslations.en: Crank: The caller is a crank caller who will likely say something snarky then hang up

entries.result: Regular: The caller is someone who frequently calls in, you know them well by now. Whatever they talk about, it's the same kind of thing they always talk about

resultTranslations.en: Regular: The caller is someone who frequently calls in, you know them well by now. Whatever they talk about, it's the same kind of thing they always talk about

entries.result: Scheduled Segment: It's time to deliver news or information. Roll on Scheduled Segments Focus and Conversation

resultTranslations.en: Scheduled Segment: It's time to deliver news or information. Roll on Scheduled Segments Focus and Conversation

entries.result: Fan: The caller says they are a fan of yours. They will likely talk about previous episodes or just tell you how much they appreciate what you do

resultTranslations.en: Fan: The caller says they are a fan of yours. They will likely talk about previous episodes or just tell you how much they appreciate what you do

entries.result: I Have To Tell You This Thing: They want to talk about something strange that happened to them or that they witnessed

resultTranslations.en: I Have To Tell You This Thing: They want to talk about something strange that happened to them or that they witnessed

entries.result: Question: They have a question for you

resultTranslations.en: Question: They have a question for you

entries.result: Bored: The caller is bored or can't sleep and wants to chat about random stuff

resultTranslations.en: Bored: The caller is bored or can't sleep and wants to chat about random stuff

entries.result: Problem: The caller has a problem they are hoping you can either help them with, or they just want you to listen

resultTranslations.en: Problem: The caller has a problem they are hoping you can either help them with, or they just want you to listen

entries.result: Scheduled Segment: It's time to deliver news or information. Roll on Scheduled Segments Focus and Conversation

resultTranslations.en: Scheduled Segment: It's time to deliver news or information. Roll on Scheduled Segments Focus and Conversation

entries.result: Previous Caller: Someone who called earlier calls again. Roll on the Call Log to see who it is

resultTranslations.en: Previous Caller: Someone who called earlier calls again. Roll on the Call Log to see who it is

entries.result: Weird: This is a Weird Call. Roll on Weird Call Focus and Conversation

resultTranslations.en: Weird: This is a Weird Call. Roll on Weird Call Focus and Conversation
